problem id: 25764d5f
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(5) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  11010101 -> 10101101
  01101110 -> 11000110
  01001110 -> 11000100
  00001010 -> 01000000
  10001010 -> 01001000
  10010111 -> 11101001
  00010111 -> 11100001
  11101001 -> 00101110
  11111101 -> 10101111
  11100110 -> 11001110

query: 10001000
predicted answer: 00001000
